full_text:
The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase, followed by Collagenase & Hyaluronidase (C&H) by María and Sarah.

Dispase dissociation media included 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 200 µl Dispase + 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Further dissociated the leftover tissue pieces with 8.9 ml DMEM/F12+++, 1 ml Collagenase & Hyaluronidase, and 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37°C, rotating for 1 hour, vortexed before and after. Filtered through a 70 µm cell strainer.

Dispase dissociated cells:

(1) RBC lysis with 3 ml for 5 min + 12 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 1 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Sequentially dissociated cells: (1) RBC lysis with 3 ml for 5 min + 12 ml DMEM/F12+++.

Cell counts:

B) Biobanking

Dispase dissociated cells: 2x 0.810^6 cells

Sequentially dissociated cells: 2x 1.1x10^6 cells

Cells were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker.

| | Dispase | Dispase + C&H
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 1.40 | 1.77
 | live [E5 cells/ml] | 8.34 | 7.84
 | viability [%] | 59.4 | 44.4
 | size [µm] | 9.4 | 7.5
2) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 1.73 | 2.69
 | live [E5 cells/ml] | 7.52 | 4.76
 | viability [%] | 43.5 | 17.7
 | size [µm] | 8.0 | 8.0
Average | [cells/ml] | 1.565x10^6 | 2.23x10^6
 | total [cells] | 1.5655x10^6 in 1mL | 2.23x10^6 in 1 mL
 | viability [%] | 51.45 | 31.05
